## Collections.Classes.LazyItemsResultMapView type

A read-only result map view that exposes [LazyItem](./ts-utils.collections.lazyitem.md) values.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type LazyItemsResultMapView<TKey extends string = string, TBase = unknown, TValue = unknown> = IReadOnlyResultMap<TKey, LazyItem<TKey, TBase, TValue>>;
```
